reviews.comment:
La atención es buena y lo importante es que el aire siempre funciona en ésta estación. Lo único remarcable son los precios que son altísimos. Cómo parámetro general un agua destilada cuesta tres veces el valor que en una estación de servicio de la competencia.

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, and importantly, the air conditioning always works at this station. The only notable thing is the prices, which are extremely high. As a general guideline, a bottle of distilled water costs three times as much as at a competing gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1MDZqMy1nRRAB
